title: local-signing: key file NotFound classified as Backend instead of NotFound
description: LocalSigningBackend::sign (lib:97-108) reads a key file at sign-time. If the file does not exist, the io::Error is mapped to SecretError::Backend. The correct mapping is SecretError::NotFound — the key is absent, which is a distinguished case (same as NotFound for any other backend). A caller checking 'if Err(SecretError::NotFound)' to fall back to another backend will not see this case. Suggested rewrite: match io::ErrorKind::NotFound => SecretError::NotFound.
